description_fr: Jordan, LeBron, Kobe, Magic, Curry. La culture NBA et le basket mondial.
description_en: Jordan, LeBron, Kobe, Magic, Curry. NBA culture and world basketball.

questions.question_fr: Combien de titres NBA Michael Jordan a-t-il remportés ?
questions.question_en: How many NBA championships did Michael Jordan win?
questions.explanation_fr: 6 titres avec les Bulls (1991-93 et 1996-98), avec MVP des finales à chaque fois.
questions.explanation_en: 6 titles with the Bulls (1991-93 and 1996-98), Finals MVP every time.

questions.question_fr: Quel joueur NBA est surnommé 'King James' ?
questions.question_en: Which NBA player is nicknamed 'King James'?
questions.explanation_fr: LeBron James, surnommé 'King James' depuis ses débuts.
questions.explanation_en: LeBron James, nicknamed 'King James' since his debut.

questions.question_fr: Une équipe NBA compte 5 joueurs sur le terrain.
questions.question_en: An NBA team has 5 players on the court.
questions.explanation_fr: Le basketball se joue à 5 contre 5 sur le terrain.
questions.explanation_en: Basketball is played 5 against 5 on the court.

questions.question_fr: Quelle équipe NBA a Kobe Bryant joué toute sa carrière ?
questions.question_en: Which NBA team did Kobe Bryant play for his entire career?
questions.explanation_fr: Kobe Bryant a joué chez les Los Angeles Lakers de 1996 à 2016, 5 titres.
questions.explanation_en: Kobe Bryant played for the LA Lakers from 1996 to 2016, 5 titles.

questions.question_fr: Quel joueur détient le record du plus de points en un match NBA (100) ?
questions.question_en: Who holds the NBA single-game scoring record (100)?
questions.explanation_fr: Wilt Chamberlain a marqué 100 points en mars 1962 contre les Knicks.
questions.explanation_en: Wilt Chamberlain scored 100 points in March 1962 against the Knicks.

questions.question_fr: Stephen Curry joue pour les Golden State ___.
questions.question_en: Stephen Curry plays for the Golden State ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Curry a remporté 4 titres NBA avec les Warriors (2015, 2017, 2018, 2022).
questions.explanation_en: Curry won 4 NBA titles with the Warriors (2015, 2017, 2018, 2022).

questions.question_fr: Quelle équipe a remporté le plus de titres NBA ?
questions.question_en: Which team has won the most NBA championships?
questions.explanation_fr: Lakers et Celtics ont chacun 17 titres NBA (record historique partagé).
questions.explanation_en: Lakers and Celtics both have 17 NBA titles (shared historic record).

questions.question_fr: Le panier de basketball mesure 3,05 mètres de haut (10 pieds).
questions.question_en: A basketball hoop is 3.05 meters high (10 feet).
questions.explanation_fr: Le panier est à 10 pieds (3,05 m) depuis l'invention du basket en 1891.
questions.explanation_en: The hoop has been 10 feet (3.05 m) high since basketball's invention in 1891.

questions.question_fr: Qui a inventé le basketball en 1891 ?
questions.explanation_fr: James Naismith, prof de gym canadien à Springfield (Massachusetts).
questions.explanation_en: James Naismith, Canadian gym teacher in Springfield, Massachusetts.

questions.question_fr: Combien de points vaut un panier à 3 points ?
questions.question_en: How many points is a 3-point shot worth?
questions.explanation_fr: 3 points si le tir est marqué derrière la ligne à 3 points (6,75 m FIBA, 7,24 m NBA).
questions.explanation_en: 3 points if scored behind the 3-point line (6.75m FIBA, 7.24m NBA).

questions.question_fr: Le geek-reverse-slamdunk culte est appelé le ___-handed dunk.
questions.question_en: The iconic reverse one-handed slam is called the ___-handed dunk.
questions.explanation_fr: Le tomahawk dunk est l'un des slams les plus spectaculaires.
questions.explanation_en: The tomahawk dunk is one of the most spectacular slam dunks.

questions.question_fr: Yao Ming est un ancien joueur NBA chinois de 2,29 m.
questions.question_en: Yao Ming is a former Chinese NBA player at 2.29m tall.
questions.explanation_fr: Yao Ming a joué pour les Houston Rockets de 2002 à 2011.
questions.explanation_en: Yao Ming played for the Houston Rockets from 2002 to 2011.

questions.question_fr: Quel pays a battu les USA en finale Euro de basket en 2022 ?
questions.explanation_fr: L'Espagne a battu la France 88-76 en finale de l'Eurobasket 2022.
questions.explanation_en: Spain beat France 88-76 in the EuroBasket 2022 final.

questions.question_fr: Combien de quart-temps comprend un match NBA ?
questions.question_en: How many quarters in an NBA game?
questions.explanation_fr: 4 quart-temps de 12 minutes en NBA (10 minutes en FIBA).
questions.explanation_en: 4 quarters of 12 minutes in NBA (10 minutes in FIBA).

questions.question_fr: Le surnom de la NBA Finals MVP s'appelle le trophée ___.
questions.question_en: The NBA Finals MVP trophy is named after ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Le trophée Bill Russell récompense le MVP des finales depuis 2009.
questions.explanation_en: The Bill Russell Trophy honors the Finals MVP since 2009.
